title: Rossorworm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''rossorworm''' was a type of vermin native to [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]. The [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] people viewed rossorworms as despicable creatures. Many of the offworlders the Togorian males came across, mostly [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], and [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], were considered equally despicable.
